description: Body-style by fuel breakdown with EV share percentage per body style. Use when user asks which body style is most electric, or how fuel mix differs across sedans, hatchbacks, SUVs.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS total = COUNT(*), electric = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El", petrol = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Benzin", diesel = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel" BY body_style = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword | EVAL ev_pct = ROUND(electric * 100.0 / total, 1) | SORT total DESC | LIMIT 12
